title: Bug Zapper, 4 Packs Fly Zapper Electric Indoor, Mosquito Killer Lamp with UV Light, Insect Trap Lamp, Electronic Catcher for Living Room, Home, Kitchen, Bedroom, Baby Room
bullet_points: 【Effective protection】Our Bug Zapper can quickly and effectively eliminate mosquitoes and other flying insects without noise. It attracts bugs by emitting high-intensity light. Then, the insects are electrocuted the charged high-voltage metal mesh electrocute the insects.It can also be used as low-consumption night lights.

【Easy to use】All you have to do is to plug the power supply of this Fly Zapper Electric Indoor into the wall socket, and then press the button to activate the device, then the fly trap will work effectively, bring you a comfortable sleep.Note: Please place this zapper in a complete dark environment for full effectiveness.

【Safe to Kids & Pets】This fly trap is non-toxic and ordorless, ideal for places where pesticides can't be sprayed like kitchens and hospitals.the narrow housing interval of mosquito zapper can effectively prevent fingers from high-voltage power grid by accidentaccident.Completely harmless to human and pets.

【Easy to Clean】To clean dead mosquitoes, ensure the Mosquito Killer Lamp is unplugged from an electrical outlet and then use a screwdriver to touch the metal plate for static electricity release. Use the tissue or small brush to get the dead bugs out.

【Versatile Usage】 4 packs of the Insect Trap Lamp can be placed indoors, such as on the balcony, in the bedroom, living room, kitchen, bathroom, garage, and other places.Its compact size means it won't take up much space while still being effective coverage is about 300 square feet.The mosquito and flies killer trap can eliminate other insects like bugs, moths, and other small fly insects.
